title: Smooth AND Fluid
description: Smooth and Fluid is a modpack that sparkles the vanilla gamplay with new visuals and optimization that works completaly on vanilla servers!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2040938fc1de209a534bd03d82498062dfdf1544.png)

What is smooth and Fluid?

Smooth and fluid is a client side lightweight modpack. This ehances the vanilla adding atmosphere, better visuals, and a lot of cute details making it smooth and comforting as possible using texture packs, and mods.

![View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/926da51536dfb57f5131c2284741246ca3f54461_0.webp)
***

This modpack is also compatible with shaders and adds better optimization
***

![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c81ef4289ac11153dfd42b088e2e9e44b397e291.jpeg) 
![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d3803339cf297403cffa9bdc0dcd496df33bd0_0.webp)

***
This modpack works completly in Vanilla servers and survivals
***
